text:
Created attachment 256380
git format-patch security/dislocker

This is a port of https://github.com/Aorimn/dislocker.

It probably needs a few tweaks to conform to the latest FreeBSD porting guidelines but otherwise builds fine and should work o.k. (at least the previous version did, I did not test today's upgrade).

-- Martin
